scripts.build: node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node -e "require('esbuild').buildSync({ entryPoints: ['server.js'], bundle: true, platform: 'node', format: 'cjs', packages: 'external', sourcemap: true, outfile: 'dist/server.cjs' })"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.lint: echo "Frontend lint skipped in JavaScript mode"
